feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: GenAI & Agentic AI Engineer. Building RAG systems, agents, and AI infrastructure that works in production.

entry.title: The Copy-Paste Trap: When Knowing “Everything” Still Leaves You with Nothing

link.title: The Copy-Paste Trap: When Knowing “Everything” Still Leaves You with Nothing

entry.summary: AI-assisted coding gives you a warm, dopamine-rich feedback loop. But somewhere along the way, we stop exercising deep engineering knowledge. Here is how to rebuild understanding.

entry.title: Why “Just Prompting” Fails on Private Data: A RAG Post-Mortem

link.title: Why “Just Prompting” Fails on Private Data: A RAG Post-Mortem

entry.summary: Naïve RAG breaks in production in surprising ways. This article walks through real failure modes, like the 'Lost in the Middle' problem, and the guardrails needed to make RAG production-ready.

entry.title: XGBoost: When Gradient Boosting Meets Regularization

link.title: XGBoost: When Gradient Boosting Meets Regularization

entry.summary: A deep technical breakdown of why XGBoost is gradient boosting on steroids, minimizing a regularized objective function to balance prediction errors and model complexity.

entry.title: PCA (Principal Component Analysis): Finding the Hidden Structure in High-Dimensional Data

link.title: PCA (Principal Component Analysis): Finding the Hidden Structure in High-Dimensional Data

entry.summary: Step-by-step breakdown of Principal Component Analysis, computing covariance matrices, eigenvalues, and how to capture maximum variance in lower-dimensional spaces.
